title_header: Tower of God, Episode 2: Headon's Floor

dialogue.speaker: Rachel
dialogue.line: WHERE ARE YOU GOING!

dialogue.speaker: Rachel
dialogue.line: I'M GOING UP THE TOWER. REMEMBER WHAT I TOLD YOU, BAM? I CAN GET TO THE OUTER WORLD IF I GET TO THE TOP OF THE TOWER. I WILL SEE BLUE SKY DURING THE DAY, AND STARLIGHT AT NIGHT. SO, I'M GOING UP THE TOWER. I'M SICK OF LIVING IN THIS DARK WORLD. I'M SORRY, BAM. I'M SORRY. FORGET ABOUT ME. LET ME BE BORN AGAIN. PLEASE.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: NO, NO! RACHEL! NO! DON'T GO, RACHEL! PLEASE DON'T DO THIS!

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: NO! DON'T GO, RACHEL! IF YOU GO, I'LL FOLLOW YOU UNTIL I DIE!

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: DON'T GO! DON'T GO, RACHEL! DON'T GOOOO! PLEASE!

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WHERE AM I?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: LIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: MY, MY. IT'S BEEN A WHILE SINCE THERE'S BEEN A VISITOR LIKE YOU HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: W-WHO'S THERE?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: WHOA, WHOA, I WON'T HURT YOU. IT'S BEEN A WHILE SINCE A VISITOR HAS OPENED THE GATE BY HIMSELF. WELCOME TO THE TOWER, YOUNG MAN.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I-IS IT A MONSTER? INSIDE THE TOWER?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: MY NAME IS HEADON. I'M THE GUARDIAN OF THE FIRST FLOOR OF THE TOWER. WHAT'S YOUR NAME, YOUNG MAN?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: MY NAME IS...

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: THE 25TH BAM. IT'S THE DAY I WAS BORN. "BAM" HAS TWO DIFFERENT MEANINGS IN KOREAN: 1. NIGHT, 2. CHESTNUT. WHAT A DIFFICULT NAME TO SAY. WELL THEN, I WILL CALL YOU BAM, BOY. NOW THAT SOUNDS TASTY!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: SO, MR. BAM, HOW DID YOU END UP HERE?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: OH! I FOLLOWED A GIRL HERE! DIDN'T A GIRL WITH BLONDE HAIR GO PAST HERE?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: A GIRL WITH BLONDE HAIR? OH! SO YOU SAW HER?! DO YOU KNOW WHERE SHE WENT?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WELL... THAT IS... PLEASE TELL ME! I NEED TO FIND HER!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: ALL ANSWERS ARE UP THERE. THAT'S ALL I CAN TELL YOU. IF YOU WANT TO FIND YOUR ANSWER AND YOUR GIRL, HEAD UP. WHETHER YOU ARE LOOKING FOR WEALTH, IMMORTALITY, ABSOLUTE POWER, MAGICAL ABILITIES, OR MYSTERIES, JUST HEAD UP. ALL THE TRUTH, GLORY, AND HAPPINESS OF THE WORLD ARE ALL UP THERE. THE TOWER IS SUCH A PLACE.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: BUT REMEMBER THAT IT IS A HARD AND PAINFUL JOURNEY TO EMBARK ON, YOUNG MAN.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I WOULD TAKE ANY RISK, JUST TO SEE HER.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: EXCELLENT, I LIKE YOUR RESOLVE. THEN, LET'S DO A TEST TO SEE IF YOU ARE QUALIFIED TO GO UP THE TOWER.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: A TEST? WHAT TEST?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: IN THIS TOWER, EVERY TIME YOU GO UP A FLOOR, THERE IS A TEST TO SEE WHETHER YOU ARE QUALIFIED TO GO TO THE NEXT FLOOR. IF YOU PASS THE TEST, YOU CAN PROCEED TO THE NEXT FLOOR. TESTS ARE DECIDED BY THE ADMINISTRATORS AND RULERS OF EACH FLOOR. OF COURSE, THE DIFFICULTY VARIES DEPENDING ON WHICH FLOOR YOU ARE ON.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: IN OTHER WORDS, IF MR. BAM WANTS TO GO UP TO THE NEXT FLOOR, YOU NEED TO PASS MY TEST.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: LOOK. THIS IS THE TEST OF THE FIRST FLOOR.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: THE "BALL"? WHAT? WHAT IS THE BALL? AND WHAT IS THAT HUGE MONSTER?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: THE "BALL" IS A SIMPLE TEST.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: THE "BALL" IS THAT ROUND, HUMAN-SIZED SPHERE. IT IS DESIGNED TO POP WHEN HIT HARD ENOUGH. TO PASS THE TEST, THE RULES ARE SIMPLE.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: YOU NEED TO GO INSIDE THE BARS AND OUTRUN OR DEFEAT THAT MONSTER BY POPPING THAT BALL. DO THAT, AND YOU PASS THE TEST.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: COULD IT BE THAT THE MONSTER IS THAT THING OVER THERE?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: CORRECT! THAT'S THE MONSTER. HE IS A "WHITE ARMORED EEL." HE IS A BIG FISH THAT LIVES IN THE SHINSU FLOWING THROUGH THE TOWER. USUALLY, HE HAS A VERY MILD TEMPERAMENT, BUT THIS TIME OF THE YEAR IS HIS SPAWNING SEASON, AND HE HASN'T EATEN ANYTHING FOR A FEW MONTHS, SO HE IS VERY AGGRESSIVE AT THE MOMENT.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: ARE YOU AFRAID OF HIM? TOO BAD. IF YOU ARE AFRAID OF THAT FISH, HOW CAN YOU PASS THE TEST? HOW CAN YOU GO ON? IF YOU'RE AFRAID, YOU'LL NEVER FIND THE GIRL YOU'RE LOOKING FOR.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: CAN'T SEE HER AGAIN? A GIRL ALONE IN THIS TOWER SURE MAKES ME WORRY. MAYBE SHE'S ALREADY BEEN EATEN BY A HUNGRY EEL, OR BEEN KIDNAPPED BY BAD PEOPLE.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: BUT MR. BAM, THINK CALMLY.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I DON'T WANT THAT.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: IT IS ALMOST IMPOSSIBLE FOR YOU TO POP THAT BALL. TAKING THIS TEST IS SUICIDAL.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I WANT TO SEE HER.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: THAT EEL IS VERY FAST AND AGILE IN THE SHINSU, AND YOU WON'T BE FAST ENOUGH TO ESCAPE. RIGHT NOW, YOU WILL END UP AS EEL FOOD. RATHER THAN COMMITTING SUICIDE, I THINK YOU SHOULD FORGET ALL THIS AND MOVE ON WITH YOUR LIFE.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: WELCOME TO THE TOWER, MR. BAM.

summary: Bam chases Rachel into the Tower, where he meets Headon, the Guardian of the First Floor. Headon explains the Tower's rules and tests, then presents Bam with a seemingly impossible challenge to find Rachel: pop a ball while evading a giant, aggressive White Armored Eel.
